name: The most common subspecies, the kajain'sa'nikto or "red nikto", adapted to survive in the Wannschok, or "Endless Wastes", a desert region on Kintan

description.value: The most common subspecies, the kajain'sa'nikto or "red nikto", adapted to survive in the Wannschok, or "Endless Wastes", a desert region on Kintan. They have a series of forehead ridges and small facial horns surrounding their eyes and on the chin. Their noses are covered with a movable flap of skin and a semi-permeable membrane which allow the nikto to breathe without ingesting sand and grit. The kajain'sa'nikto also have a pair of breathing tubes on each side of the neck with openings covered by similar membranes. These membranes also trap exhaled water vapor and sent it back into their system. Their equivalent of smiling is flattening their mouth flaps. Red nikto have been known to be red, orange, yellow, or brown, making them the most diverse in terms of colors compared to other nikto.
